patch_type: Trust Evidence Workbench over V59.5 Internet Trust QA guardrails
release_chain_status: V60 is the current implemented build. It loads after V59.5 in src/ui/v52-7-operational-layer.js. It adds a broader static evidence workbench for manual evidence entry, evidence state visibility, ownership, review accountability, state transition rules, and Proof Pack traceability. GitHub Pages browser QA is required after deploy.
top_level_tab_rule: Do not add more top-level tabs. Upgrade existing workspaces only.
public_naming_rule: Public product name is CyberShield Executive OS. Current prototype build is V60. Do not call the public build CyberShield OS v8 unless the repo, README, loader, Settings/admin metadata, and public UX intentionally move to that version scheme.
controlling_doctrine: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
v60_changes: adds Trust Evidence Workbench into Evidence
adds Trust Evidence Workbench into Runtime
adds Trust Evidence Workbench into Proof Pack
adds sample evidence objects linked to claims, decisions, and Proof Pack sections
preserves V59.5 Internet Trust QA and Copy Guardrail Pass

trust_evidence_workbench.boundary: Static advisory prototype only. No live evidence retrieval, backend persistence, ticketing, notifications, workflow automation, enforcement, or external integrations.

recommended_next_build.label: V60.1 Evidence State Transition Prototype
goals: show how evidence moves from weak states to verified_by_human
show required human action per transition
preserve prototype boundaries and avoid live workflow claims

implemented_release_train.v59.5: Internet Trust QA and Copy Guardrail Pass

prototype_boundary: The current GitHub Pages build is a lightweight static advisory prototype. It is not connected to live enterprise telemetry, SIEM, EDR, IAM, Microsoft 365, cloud control planes, GRC tooling, production agent enforcement, Google Sheets, CRM sync, ticketing, notifications, marketplace systems, ad platforms, domain-intelligence systems, identity verification systems, CMMC certification systems, healthcare compliance validation systems, banking/payment systems, live monitoring, live URL ingestion, live internet retrieval, live evidence retrieval, live scoring, live claim extraction, internet claim verification, report delivery, ticketing, workflow automation, notifications, backend persistence, or takedown automation.
known_limitations: Trust Evidence Workbench is a static prototype scaffold
Manual evidence fields are editable-looking local UI only
V60 does not persist evidence to a backend
V60 does not retrieve live evidence
V60 does not perform live verification
V60 does not create tickets or send notifications
V60 does not perform workflow automation
GitHub Pages browser QA required after deploy
